children.heading: .—Prohibition on Importation, Manufacture, and Distribution
children.label: a .—Prohibition on Importation, Manufacture, and Distribution

children.text: a system that has the same functional characteristics as the Serial Copy Management System and requires that copyright and generation status information be accurately sent, received, and acted upon between devices using the system’s method of serial copying regulation and devices using the Serial Copy Management System; or
any other system certified by the Secretary of Commerce as prohibiting unauthorized serial copying.

children.heading: .—Development of Verification Procedure
children.label: b .—Development of Verification Procedure
children.text: The Secretary of Commerce shall establish a procedure to verify, upon the petition of an interested party, that a system meets the standards set forth in subsection (a)(2).

children.heading: .—Prohibition on Circumvention of the System
children.label: c .—Prohibition on Circumvention of the System
children.text: No person shall import, manufacture, or distribute any device, or offer or perform any service, the primary purpose or effect of which is to avoid, bypass, remove, deactivate, or otherwise circumvent any program or circuit which implements, in whole or in part, a system described in subsection (a).

children.heading: Encoding of Information on Digital Musical Recordings.—
children.label: d Encoding of Information on Digital Musical Recordings.—

children.heading: .—Prohibition on encoding inaccurate information
children.label: 1 .—Prohibition on encoding inaccurate information
children.text: No person shall encode a digital musical recording of a sound recording with inaccurate information relating to the category code, copyright status, or generation status of the source material for the recording.

children.heading: .—Encoding of copyright status not required
children.label: 2 .—Encoding of copyright status not required
children.text: Nothing in this chapter requires any person engaged in the importation or manufacture of digital musical recordings to encode any such digital musical recording with respect to its copyright status.

children.heading: .—Information Accompanying Transmissions in Digital Format
children.label: e .—Information Accompanying Transmissions in Digital Format
children.text: Any person who transmits or otherwise communicates to the public any sound recording in digital format is not required under this chapter to transmit or otherwise communicate the information relating to the copyright status of the sound recording. Any such person who does transmit or otherwise communicate such copyright status information shall transmit or communicate such information accurately.
